steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:9002
steps.observed: Dashboard loaded successfully with 'Threat Radar Wall' title

steps.action: Scroll to Threads (5) section in η lane
steps.observed: 5 thread cards visible under 'Threads (5)' heading

steps.action: Inspect first thread card 'Iran / Conducted / Large-scale / Naval'
steps.observed: Title: 'Iran / Conducted / Large-scale / Naval', subtitle: 'emerging' status badge, 3 horizontal gauge bars (geopolitics 0.50, middle-east 0.50, energy 0.50) each with .eta-gauge-bar class, fill bar, and numeric value

steps.action: Verify gauge bar DOM structure
steps.observed: Each gauge bar has: eta-gauge-bar-label, eta-gauge-bar-track with eta-gauge-bar-fill (width: 50%), and eta-gauge-bar-value span showing '0.50'

assertions.title: Narrative Branches

steps.action: Scroll to 'Narrative Branches' heading in η lane
steps.expected: Narrative branch section visible with ≥ 2 interpretations
steps.observed: Narrative Branches heading (h4) visible with branch map SVG visualization

steps.action: Inspect branch visualization
steps.observed: 3 branches displayed: 'energy' (60%), 'diplomacy' (20%), 'geopolitics' (20%) — rendered as a node graph with labeled branches and percentage bars

steps.action: Verify branch data source
steps.observed: API returns 3 narrativeBranches with labels, probabilities (0.6, 0.2, 0.2), and scoring dimensions (realism, fear, publicBenefit, actionability, polarizationRisk, compressionLoss)

assertions.issues: Narrative branches are displayed at the radar section level, not within individual thread article cards. The section is within the η lane radar card alongside the thread listing.

steps.action: Inspect Bluesky-sourced thread card 'Iran / Conducted / Large-scale / Naval'
steps.observed: Source badge with Bluesky icon (SVG), label 'Bluesky', and count '1' — rendered as span.source-badge with cyan color (rgb(0, 133, 255)), data-testid='source-badge-bluesky'

steps.action: Inspect Reddit-sourced thread card 'Detailed / Analysis / Chokepoint / Affects'
steps.observed: Source badge with Reddit icon (SVG), label 'Reddit', and count '1' — rendered as span.source-badge with orange color (rgb(255, 69, 0)), data-testid='source-badge-reddit'

steps.action: Verify all 5 thread cards have source badges
steps.observed: 3 Bluesky-sourced threads show 'Bluesky 1' badge; 2 Reddit-sourced threads show 'Reddit 1' badge

evidence.network: Thread objects in API response include source_distribution: {bluesky:1} or {reddit:1}

steps.action: Inspect thread card 'Iran / Conducted / Large-scale / Naval'
steps.observed: Label 'moderate uncertainty' displayed in span.eta-thread-uncertainty.uncertainty-moderate with data-testid='thread-uncertainty'

steps.action: Inspect thread card 'Detailed / Analysis / Chokepoint / Affects'
steps.observed: Label 'moderate uncertainty' displayed with same CSS class and test ID

steps.action: Verify all 5 thread cards have uncertainty labels
steps.observed: All 5 thread cards display 'moderate uncertainty' label (consistent with disagreement_index=0.35 from live snapshot)

evidence.network: Live snapshot has disagreement_index=0.35, threads derive 'moderate' uncertainty level

steps.action: Query Postgres for Bluesky signals
steps.observed: 3 signals with source='bluesky': sig-geo-01 (Iran Naval Exercises), sig-geo-02 (Oil Tanker Insurance), sig-geo-03 (US Navy Carrier)

steps.action: Query Postgres for threads with Bluesky source
steps.observed: 3 threads with source_distribution={"bluesky":1}: 'Iran / Conducted / Large-scale / Naval', 'Lloyds / Market / Reports / Increase', 'Uss / Eisenhower / Carrier / Strike'

steps.action: Check API for snapshot score ranges
steps.observed: Live snapshot render_state.deterministicSnapshot.scoreRanges contains 8 dimensions (diplomacy, energy, geopolitics, infrastructure, insurance, middle-east, military, shipping) with min/max/median values. disagreement_index=0.35, model_count=2

steps.action: Verify clock in η lane via browser
steps.observed: Threat clock for 'Strait of Hormuz Monitor' visible showing 2.7 THREAT with colored arc gauge in the η (Global Forces) lane

evidence.network: DB: SELECT source FROM signals -> 3 bluesky rows. API: GET /api/radars -> radar with liveSnapshot.signals containing transit_flow, attack_tempo, insurance_availability with weighted_values from 2 models

steps.action: Query Postgres for Reddit signals
steps.observed: 2 signals with source='reddit': sig-geo-04 (Energy Infrastructure Vulnerability Analysis), sig-geo-05 (Diplomatic Channels Stalling on Iran)

steps.action: Query Postgres for threads with Reddit source
steps.observed: 2 threads with source_distribution={"reddit":1}: 'Detailed / Analysis / Chokepoint / Affects', 'Mediation / Attempts / Reportedly / Stalled'

steps.action: Verify snapshot includes data from both sources
steps.observed: Live snapshot includes narrative branches referencing Reddit-sourced threads: 'diplomacy' branch (20%) cites 'Mediation / Attempts / Reportedly / Stalled', 'energy' branch (60%) cites 'Detailed / Analysis / Chokepoint / Affects'

steps.action: Verify clock in η lane shows combined Bluesky+Reddit data
steps.observed: Same Strait of Hormuz Monitor clock at 2.7 THREAT level displays data derived from both Bluesky and Reddit signal pipelines

evidence.network: DB: SELECT source FROM signals -> 2 reddit rows. API: /api/radars -> radar with 5 threads (2 reddit-sourced) and liveSnapshot with render_state.deterministicSnapshot.narrativeBranches citing reddit thread titles

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. VAL-ETA-002 (thread cards with gauges), VAL-ETA-003 (narrative branches with 3 interpretations), VAL-ETA-004 (Bluesky/Reddit source badges), VAL-ETA-005 (moderate uncertainty labels), VAL-CROSS-001 (Bluesky→η pipeline end-to-end), VAL-CROSS-002 (Reddit→η pipeline end-to-end).
